prerequisites: A HubSpot app (public/OAuth app or private app) created in the developer or account settings, with the OAuth scopes needed for the streams you want to sync (for example crm.objects.contacts.read, crm.objects.companies.read, crm.schemas.companies.read, crm.objects.deals.read, crm.objects.custom.read).
OAuth credentials (client ID, client secret, and a refresh token) or a private app access token to populate the required credentials config field.
Optionally, a start_date (format yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ssZ) to bound how far back data is replicated.

authMethods.name: OAuth 2.0 (Authorization Code)
authMethods.summary: Uses the OAuth 2.0 authorization code grant. You supply credentials.client_secret and credentials.refresh_token (plus a client ID); the connector exchanges the refresh token at https://api.hubapi.com/oauth/v3/token to obtain a short-lived credentials.access_token. Access tokens are valid for 30 minutes and are refreshed automatically. Grant the app the OAuth scopes matching the streams you sync.

authMethods.name: Private App access token
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a static private app access token supplied via credentials.access_token. The token carries the scopes granted to the private app. Unlike OAuth tokens it does not refresh, so it must be regenerated manually if it is revoked or rotated.

setupSteps.title: Create a HubSpot app and grant scopes
setupSteps.body: In HubSpot, create either a public app (for OAuth) or a private app. Add the scopes required by the streams you intend to sync, such as crm.objects.contacts.read, crm.objects.companies.read, crm.schemas.companies.read, crm.objects.deals.read, and crm.objects.custom.read. A HubSpot Super Admin must install a public app into the target account.

setupSteps.title: Obtain OAuth credentials or a private app token
setupSteps.body: For OAuth, find the client ID on the app's settings page and use the client secret. Run the authorization code flow: direct the user to HubSpot's authorization URL with your client ID, scopes, and redirect URI; the user consents and is redirected back with a code; POST that code with grant_type=authorization_code, client ID, client secret, and redirect URI to https://api.hubapi.com/oauth/v3/token to receive the access and refresh tokens. For a private app, copy the access token from the private app's settings.

setupSteps.title: Fill in the credentials config field
setupSteps.body: Set the required credentials object. For OAuth, provide credentials.client_secret and credentials.refresh_token (with the client ID); the connector manages credentials.access_token. For private app auth, provide credentials.access_token.

setupSteps.title: Configure optional sync settings
setupSteps.body: Optionally set start_date (yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ssZ) to bound replication. Tune lookback_window (CRM Search lookback in minutes) and property_history_lookback_window for incremental resyncing. Toggle treat_numbers_and_booleans_as_strings for type coercion, enable_experimental_streams as needed, set num_worker for parallelism, and list association_streams and custom_object_association_streams to sync object associations.
